Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Pursuant To Ccp Section 418.10
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Continued To Sep-23-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED SUPPLY CO. Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Pursuant To CCP Section 418.10. and, Plaintiff's request for continuance to conduct jurisdictional discovery only. Appearances: Bryn C. Gallagher, Esq. of Clapper Patti Schweizer & Mason (415) 332-4262, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Cesar A. Alvarado, Esq. of Archer Norris (925) 930-6600, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted for continuance to conduct jurisdictional discovery only. Hearing on Defendant Consolidated Supply Co. Motion to Quash Service of Summons is continued to September 23, 2009. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
